full_text:
Liu (Zijing) 劉? (子敬)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Liu (劉?), styledZijing (子敬), was born in Zhuo county, Zhuo commandery. Expressed concern that the ambitions of his nephew Liu Bei would doom their family.
